case_title: SKY TV VS. BUN BO HUE AN NAM 2

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SKY TV

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-25-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-25-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SKYLINK TV REPRESENTED BY TSZ HO LUI ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. DEFENDANT BUN BO HUE AN NAM 2 DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKY TV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUN BO HUE AN NAM 2 $4,760.00 PRINCIPAL, $149.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,909.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

COPYING FEES (8 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SKY TV
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE: $99.00 SERVED DEC-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BUN BO HUE AN NAM 2
